title: dianella longifolia var. longifolia
intro: Dianella longifolia var. longifolia, also known as the flax lily, is a type of flowering plant native to Australia and New Zealand. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant has been shown to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, soothing skin conditions, and supporting immune function. Dianella longifolia var. longifolia can be prepared into herbal remedies like teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
